```{r}
      aes(label = lab),
      vjust = -1,
      size = 1.5,
      family = "TeX Gyre Pagella"
    ) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(slab) +
    scale_x_discrete(
      guide = legendry::guide_axis_nested(key = key_range_auto(sep = "!")),
      name = "Day following vaccination"
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous("Proportion", limit = c(0, ymax), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(y = "Proportion") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
  return(p)
}

plot_sys_reaction <- function(diary_sol, x, ymax = 1) {
  p <- diary_sol |>
    mutate(intensity = ordered(as.numeric(intensity) - 1)) |>
    filter(term == x) |>
    plot_react(trt, intensity, x, "0", ymax = ymax) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 7.5, linetype = 1, colour = "grey80") +
    labs(
      caption = paste0(
        "Grade 1: easily tolerated\n",
        "Grade 2: interferes with normal everyday activities\n",
        "Grade 3: prevents normal everyday activities or requires significant medical intervention\n"
      )
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = rel(0.5), lineheight = 1)
    )
  return(p)
}

plot_isr <- function(
  dat,
  trt = treatment,
  var = size_cat,
  ref = 0,
  ylim = 1,
  var_lab = "Size (mm)"
) {
  make_plot_data <- function(dat, trt = trt, var = var, ref = ref) {
    pdat <- dat |>
      group_by({{ trt }}, vaxage, vaccine, day) |>
      count({{ var }}) |>
      mutate(
        p = n / if_else(is.na({{ var }}), sum(n), sum(n[!is.na({{ var }})]))
      ) |>
      ungroup() |>
      complete(
        {{ trt }},
        nesting(vaxage, vaccine),
        day,
        {{ var }},
        fill = list(n = 0, p = 0)
      ) |>
      to_factor()
    plab <- dat |>
      summarise(
        n = sum({{ var }} != ref, na.rm = TRUE),
        p = mean({{ var }} != ref, na.rm = TRUE),
        lab = sprintf(
          "%i/%i",
          sum({{ var }} != ref, na.rm = TRUE),
          sum(!is.na({{ var }}))
        ),
        .by = c({{ trt }}, vaxage, vaccine, day)
      )
    return(list(pdat, plab))
  }
  out <- make_plot_data(dat, {{ trt }}, {{ var }}, ref)
  pdat <- out[[1]]
  plab <- out[[2]]

  base_plot <- function(pdat, plab) {
    ggplot(
      pdat |> filter({{ var }} != ref),
      aes(interaction(day, {{ trt }}, sep = "!"), p)
    ) +
      facet_wrap2(
        vaxage ~ vaccine,
        strip = strip_nested(
          background_x = elem_list_rect(
            fill = c("grey90", "grey80"),
            colour = c("white", "grey20")
          ),
          by_layer_x = TRUE
        ),
        ncol = 4
      ) +
      geom_col(aes(fill = {{ var }})) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 7.5, colour = "grey80") +
      scale_fill_viridis_d(var_lab) +
      scale_x_discrete(
        guide = legendry::guide_axis_nested(key_range_auto(sep = "!")),
        name = "Day following vaccination"
      ) +
      scale_y_continuous("Proportion", limit = c(0, ylim), expand = c(0, 0)) +
      theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "top")
  }
  g <- base_plot(pdat, plab)
  return(g)
}

st1_diary <- read_parquet(file.path(st1_pth, "diary-temperature.parquet"))
st2_diary <- select_form(dat_raw, "diary")
```

### Returned

```{r}
tab_dat <- st1_diary |>
  to_factor() |>
  select(subjectid, vaxage, diaretyn) |>
  filter(!is.na(vaxage)) |>
  distinct() |>
  mutate(stage = "Stage 1") |>
  mutate(subjectid = gsub("^01", "01-", subjectid)) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, subjid, trt), join_by(subjectid == subjid)) |>
  rename(record_id = subjectid) |>
  bind_rows(
    st2_diary |>
      filter(reaction == "shared") |>
      pull(data) |>
      pluck(1) |>
      select(record_id, vaxage, diaretyn) |>
      distinct() |>
      mutate(
        diaretyn = if_else(!diaretyn | is.na(diaretyn), "No", "Yes"),
        stage = "Stage 2"
      ) |>
      left_join(select(dat_base, record_id, trt), join_by(record_id))
  ) |>
  mutate(
    vaxage = factor(
      vaxage,
      levels = c("6-week", "4-month", "6-month", "18-month")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-diary-returned-stage1
#| tbl-cap: |
#|   Returned diary cards from stage 1.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
#| results: "asis"
tab_dat |>
  filter(stage == "Stage 1") |>
  tbl_strata2(
    strata = vaxage,
    .tbl_fun = ~ .x |>
      tbl_summary(
        include = diaretyn,
        by = trt,
        label = list(diaretyn = .y)
      ) |>
      add_overall(last = TRUE) |>
      remove_footnote_header(contains("stat_")),
    .combine_with = "tbl_stack",
    .combine_args = list(group_header = NULL)
  ) |>
  modify_header(
    all_stat_cols() ~
      paste0(
        "\\makecell{{\\textbf{{{level}}} \\\\\\\\ ",
        "N = {formatC(n, format='d', big.mark=',')}}}"
      )
  ) |>
  as_gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(9),
    table.width = pct(75),
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE
  ) |>
  as_latex() |>
  latex_unescape() |>
  cat()
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-diary-returned-stage2
#| tbl-cap: |
#|   Returned diary cards from stage 2.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
#| results: "asis"
tab_dat |>
  filter(stage == "Stage 2") |>
  tbl_strata2(
    strata = vaxage,
    .tbl_fun = ~ .x |>
      tbl_summary(
        include = diaretyn,
        by = trt,
        label = list(diaretyn = .y)
      ) |>
      add_overall(last = TRUE) |>
      remove_footnote_header(contains("stat_")),
    .combine_with = "tbl_stack",
    .combine_args = list(group_header = NULL)
  ) |>
  modify_header(
    all_stat_cols() ~
      paste0(
        "\\makecell{{\\textbf{{{level}}} \\\\\\\\ ",
        "N = {formatC(n, format='d', big.mark=',')}}}"
      )
  ) |>
  as_gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(9),
    table.width = pct(75),
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE
  ) |>
  as_latex() |>
  latex_unescape() |>
  cat()
```

\clearpage

### Solicited systemic reactions

```{r}
#| label: diary-sol-data
st1_sol <- read_parquet(file.path(
  st1_pth,
  "diary-solicited-reactions.parquet"
)) |>
  to_factor() |>
  filter(!is.na(vaxage)) |>
  mutate(subjid = gsub("^01", "01-", subjectid)) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, subjid, trt), join_by(subjid)) |>
  rename(record_id = subjid) |>
  select(record_id, trt, vaxage, term, day, intensity) |>
  mutate(term = str_to_sentence(term), stage = 1)

st2_sol <- filter(st2_diary, reaction == "sol") |>
  pull(data) |>
  pluck(1) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, record_id, trt), join_by(record_id)) |>
  select(record_id, trt, vaxage, term, day, intensity) |>
  mutate(day = as.integer(day), stage = 2)

diary_sol <- bind_rows(st1_sol, st2_sol) |>
  mutate(
    vaxage = factor(
      vaxage,
      levels = c("6-week", "4-month", "6-month", "18-month")
    )
  )
```

#### Irritability

```{r}
#| label: fig-irritability-daily
#| fig-cap: Irritability day 0 to 6 by vaccination age and assigned treatment.
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
plot_sys_reaction(diary_sol, "Irritability")
```

\clearpage

#### Vomiting

@fig-vomiting-daily presents the distribution of daily grades for vomiting following each vaccination occassion by assigned treatment.

```{r}
#| label: fig-vomiting-daily
#| fig-cap: Vomiting day 0 to 6 by vaccination age and assigned treatment.
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
plot_sys_reaction(diary_sol, "Vomiting")
```

\clearpage

#### Diarrhoea

@fig-diarrhoea-daily presents the distribution of daily grades for diarrhoea following each vaccination occassion by assigned treatment.

```{r}
#| label: fig-diarrhoea-daily
#| fig-cap: Diarrhoea day 0 to 6 by vaccination age and assigned treatment.
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
plot_sys_reaction(diary_sol, "Diarrhoea")
```

\clearpage

#### Decreased Feeding

@fig-decreasedfeeding-daily presents the distribution of daily intensity grades for decreased feeding following each vaccination occassion by assigned treatment.

```{r}
#| label: fig-decreasedfeeding-daily
#| fig-cap: Decreased feeding day 0 to 6 by vaccination age and assigned treatment.
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
plot_sys_reaction(diary_sol, "Decreased feeding")
```

\clearpage

#### Drowsiness

@fig-drowsiness-daily presents the distribution of daily intensity grades for drowsiness following each vaccination occassion by assigned treatment.

```{r}
#| label: fig-drowsiness-daily
#| fig-cap: Drowsiness day 0 to 6 by vaccination age and assigned treatment.
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
plot_sys_reaction(diary_sol, "Drowsiness")
```

\clearpage

#### Restlessness

@fig-restlessness-daily presents the distribution of daily intensity grades for restlessness following each vaccination occassion by assigned treatment.

```{r}
#| label: fig-restlessness-daily
#| fig-cap: Restlessness day 0 to 6 by vaccination age and assigned treatment.
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
plot_sys_reaction(diary_sol, "Restlessness")
```

\clearpage

#### Fever

```{r}
#| label: diary-temp-data
st1_temp <- read_parquet(file.path(
  st1_pth,
  "diary-temperature.parquet"
)) |>
  to_factor() |>
  filter(!is.na(vaxage)) |>
  rename(temp_fac = temp_cat) |>
  mutate(subjid = gsub("^01", "01-", subjectid)) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, subjid, trt), join_by(subjid)) |>
  rename(record_id = subjid) |>
  select(record_id, trt, vaxage, day, temp_fac)

st2_temp <- filter(st2_diary, reaction == "temp") |>
  pull(data) |>
  pluck(1) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, record_id, trt), join_by(record_id)) |>
  select(record_id, trt, vaxage, day, temp_fac) |>
  mutate(day = as.integer(day))

diary_temp <- bind_rows(st1_temp, st2_temp) |>
  mutate(
    vaxage = factor(
      vaxage,
      levels = c("6-week", "4-month", "6-month", "18-month")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-fever
#| fig-cap: Fever by vaccination age and assigned treatment, stage 1 and 2 combined.
plot_fever <- function() {
  p <- diary_temp |>
    plot_react(trt, temp_fac, "Temperature", "None (<38)") +
    ylim(0, 0.1)
  return(p)
}
plot_fever()
```

\clearpage

### Solicited Injection Site Reactions

```{r}
#| label: data-isr
st1_isr <- read_parquet(file.path(st1_pth, "diary-site-reactions.parquet")) |>
  to_factor() |>
  mutate(
    vaccine = fct_recode(
      vaccine,
      "aP/wP" = "aP or wP",
      "MMR" = "MMRV",
      "DTPa-hepB-IPV-Hib" = "DTaP-Hib-HepB-IPV",
      "PCV-13" = "13vPCV"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(subjid = gsub("^01", "01-", subjectid)) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, subjid, trt), join_by(subjid)) |>
  rename(record_id = subjid, size_fac = size_cat) |>
  select(record_id, trt, term, vaxage, vaccine, day, size, size_fac) |>
  mutate(stage = 1)

st2_isr <- st2_diary |>
  filter(reaction == "isr") |>
  pull(data) |>
  pluck(1) |>
  left_join(
    st2_diary |>
      filter(reaction == "shared") |>
      pull(data) |>
      pluck(1),
    join_by(record_id, visit, vaxage, vaxloc_id)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    day = as.integer(day),
    vaccine = fct_recode(vaccine, "PCV-13" = "PCv13")
  ) |>
  select(record_id, vaxage, term, vaccine, day, size, size_fac) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, record_id, trt), join_by(record_id)) |>
  mutate(stage = 2) |>
  filter(!is.na(vaccine))


diary_isr <- bind_rows(st1_isr, st2_isr) |>
  mutate(
    vaxage = factor(
      vaxage,
      levels = c("6-week", "4-month", "6-month", "18-month")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-redness-daily
#| fig-cap: |
#|    Injection site erythema by vaccination age, vaccine, and assigned treatment.
#|    Stage 1: 6-week, 4-month, 6-month, 18-month.
#|    Stage 2: 6-week, 18-month.
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4
plot_isr(
  diary_isr |> filter(term == "Erythema"),
  trt = trt,
  var = size_fac,
  ref = "None",
  var_lab = "Redness size (mm)"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-swelling-daily
#| fig-cap: |
#|   Injection site swelling by vaccination age, vaccine, and assigned treatment.
#|   Stage 1: 6-week, 4-month, 6-month, 18-month.
#|   Stage 2: 6-week, 18-month.
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4
plot_isr(
  diary_isr |> filter(term == "Swelling"),
  trt = trt,
  var = size_fac,
  ref = "None",
  var_lab = "Swelling size (mm)"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-induration-daily
#| fig-cap:  |
#|   Injection site induration by vaccination age, vaccine, and assigned treatment.
#|   Stage 1: 6-week, 4-month, 6-month, 18-month.
#|   Stage 2: 6-week, 18-month.
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4
plot_isr(
  diary_isr |> filter(term == "Induration"),
  trt = trt,
  var = size_fac,
  ref = "None",
  var_lab = "Induration size (mm)"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: diary-pain-data
st1_pain <- read_parquet(file.path(st1_pth, "diary-pain.parquet")) |>
  to_factor() |>
  mutate(
    vaccine = fct_recode(
      vaccine,
      "aP/wP" = "aP or wP",
      "MMR" = "MMRV",
      "DTPa-hepB-IPV-Hib" = "DTaP-Hib-HepB-IPV",
      "PCV-13" = "13vPCV"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(subjid = gsub("^01", "01-", subjectid)) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, subjid, trt), join_by(subjid)) |>
  rename(record_id = subjid) |>
  select(record_id, trt, vaxage, vaccine, day, pain) |>
  mutate(stage = 1)
st2_pain <- st2_diary |>
  filter(reaction == "pain") |>
  pull(data) |>
  pluck(1) |>
  left_join(
    st2_diary |>
      filter(reaction == "shared") |>
      pull(data) |>
      pluck(1),
    join_by(record_id, visit, vaxage, vaxloc_id)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    day = as.integer(day),
    vaccine = fct_recode(vaccine, "PCV-13" = "PCv13")
  ) |>
  select(record_id, vaxage, vaccine, day, pain) |>
  left_join(select(dat_base, record_id, trt), join_by(record_id)) |>
  mutate(stage = 2) |>
  filter(!is.na(vaccine))

# Fill in missing records
# ids <- st2_diary |>
#   filter(reaction == "pain") |>
#   pull(data) |>
#   pluck(1) |> pull(record_id) |> unique()
# st2_pain <- st2_pain |>
#   complete(record_id = ids, nesting(vaxage, vaccine), day)

diary_pain <- bind_rows(st1_pain, st2_pain) |>
  mutate(
    vaxage = factor(
      vaxage,
      levels = c("6-week", "4-month", "6-month", "18-month")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-pain-daily
#| fig-cap: Injection site pain by vaccination age, vaccine, and assigned treatment.
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4
plot_isr(diary_pain, trt, pain, ref = "None", var_lab = "Pain intensity")
```
  
\clearpage

# Appendix {.appendix}

## Primary outcome listings
  
```{r}
#| label: tbl-listing-ofc-matched-foods
#| tbl-cap: |
#|    Listing of infants with oral food challenge outcome by 18 months of age and corresponding SPT positive allergens.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
dat_po_ofc |>
  select(record_id, trt, po_ofc_foods, po_ofc_match) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(
    trt ~ "Treatment",
    po_ofc_foods ~ "OFC positive foods",
    po_ofc_match ~ "Foods with positive SPT"
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9), table.width = pct(75))
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-listing-ana-matched-foods
#| tbl-cap: Listing of infants with anaphylaxis outcome by 18 months of age and corresponding SPT positive allergens.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
dat_po_ana |>
  select(record_id, trt, po_ana_foods, po_ana_match) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(
    trt ~ "Treatment",
    po_ana_foods ~ "Anaphylaxis foods",
    po_ana_match ~ "Foods with positive SPT"
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9), table.width = pct(75))
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-listing-ige-matched-foods
#| tbl-cap: |
#|    Listing of infants with IgE-mediated food allergy outcome by 18 months of age and corresponding
#|    SPT positive allergens.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
dat_po_ige |>
  select(record_id, trt, po_ige_foods, po_ige_match) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(
    trt ~ "Treatment",
    po_ige_foods ~ "IgE mediated foods",
    po_ige_match ~ "Foods with positive SPT"
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9), table.width = pct(75))
```

\clearpage

## Secondary outcome listings

```{r}
#| label: tbl-listing-eczema
#| tbl-cap: Listing of infants with eczema diagnosis and positive SPT to any allergen.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
dat_ecz_spt |>
  filter(!out_ecz_preexisting, ecz, any_pos_spt) |>
  select(record_id, trt, outageval_months2) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 0) |>
  cols_label(
    trt ~ "Treatment",
    outageval_months2 ~ "Age at first reaction (months)"
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(9),
    table.width = pct(60),
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE
  )
```

\clearpage

## IgE responses

```{r}
dat_ige <- select_form(dat_raw, "ige")
dat_ige <- dat_base |>
  right_join(dat_ige, join_by(record_id, subjid)) |>
  select(
    record_id,
    subjid,
    trt,
    gender,
    bfed,
    fborn,
    parinc_imp,
    ces,
    fha,
    visit_age,
    allergen,
    ige,
    comment
  )

multinorm <- cmdstan_model(here("stan", "multinorrm-cens.stan"))

make_stan_data <- function(
  dd,
  form = ~trt,
  var = log_ige,
  L = log10(c(0.005, 0.005, 0.0005))
) {
  tmp <- dd |>
    filter(row_number() == 1, .by = subjid)
  X <- model.matrix(form, data = tmp)
  X <- cbind(
    X[, 1:2, drop = FALSE],
    scale(X[, -(1:2), drop = FALSE], scale = F)
  )
  out <- list(
    N = nrow(tmp),
    J = 3,
    X = X,
    P = ncol(X),
    Y = dd |>
      select(subjid, visit_age, {{ var }}) |>
      spread(visit_age, {{ var }}) |>
      select(-subjid) |>
      mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(.x, -99))) |>
      as.matrix(),
    R = dd |>
      mutate(
        R = case_when(
          is.na({{ var }}) ~ 1,
          {{ var }} == -Inf ~ 2,
          !is.na({{ var }}) ~ 0
        )
      ) |>
      select(subjid, visit_age, R) |>
      spread(visit_age, R) |>
      select(-subjid) |>
      as.matrix(),
    L = L
  )
  return(out)
}

gmr_table_dat <- function(gmr) {
  tdat <- gmr |>
    mutate(
      across(V1, list(
        mean = ~ mean(.x),
        sd = ~ sd(.x),
        med = ~ median(.x),
        lo = ~ quantile(.x, 0.025)[1, ],
        hi = ~ quantile(.x, 0.975)[1, ],
        pr = ~ Pr(.x < 1)
      ))
    ) |>
    select(-V1)
  return(tdat)
}

gmr_table <- function(tdat) {
  gt(tdat, rowname_col = "visit_age", groupname_col = "group") |>
    fmt_number(everything(), decimals = 2) |>
    cols_merge(
      c(V1_mean, V1_sd),
      pattern = "<<{1} $\\pm$ {2}>>"
    ) |>
    cols_merge(
      c(V1_lo, V1_hi),
      pattern = "<<({1}, {2})>>"
    ) |>
    cols_label(
      V1_mean = md("Mean &#177; std"),
      V1_med = "Median",
      V1_lo = md("95% CrI"),
      V1_pr = "Pr(< 1)",
    ) |>
    tab_stub_indent(
      rows = everything(),
      indent = 1
    ) |>
    tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
}

make_ate <- function(dat, fit) {
  nd <- filter(dat, visit_age == "6-month")
  ndat <- expand_grid(
    visit_age = c("6-month", "7-month", "19-month"),
    trt = c("aP", "wP")
  )
  tmp <- brmsmargins(
    fit,
    newdata = nd,
    at = ndat,
    effects = "integrateoutRE",
    CI = 0.95,
    k = 100L,
    seed = 123,
    contrasts = cbind(
      "6-month_wP - aP" = c(-1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0),
      "7-month_wP - aP" = c(0, 0, -1, 1, 0, 0),
      "19-month_wP - aP" = c(0, 0, 0, 0, -1, 1)
    )
  )
  r <- rvar(cbind(tmp$Posterior, tmp$Contrasts))
  names(r)[seq_len(nrow(ndat))] <- apply(ndat, 1, paste, collapse = "_")
  out <- as_tibble(t(r)) |>
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = c("visit_age", "trt"),
      names_sep = "_",
      values_to = "posterior"
    ) |>
    mutate(measure = "RD")
  return(out)
}
```

The 6 and 7 month IgE responses were previously reported. 
What follows additionally reports on 19-month IgE responses.
Descriptive statistics are reported in @tbl-sample-ige-gmc.

```{r}
#| label: tbl-sample-ige-gmc
#| code-summary: Sample summaries
#| tbl-cap: |
#|    Sample IgE concentration summaries (kU/L) by allergen type, visit age,
#|    and assigned vaccination schedule.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
#| results: "asis"
tab <- dat_ige |>
  mutate(
    ige = if_else(ige == 0, 0.0005, ige)
  ) |>
  summarise(
    obs = sum(!is.na(ige)),
    gmc = 10^mean(log10(ige), na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(ige, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(ige, na.rm = TRUE),
    det = mean(ige >= 0.01, na.rm = TRUE),
    con = mean(ige >= 0.1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = c(allergen, visit_age, trt)
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = trt,
    values_from = c(obs, gmc, min, max, det, con),
    names_vary = "slowest"
  ) |>
  to_factor() |>
  arrange(allergen, visit_age)

gt(tab, groupname_col = "allergen", rowname_col = "visit_age") |>
  fmt_integer(starts_with("obs")) |>
  fmt_number(starts_with("gmc"), decimals = 2) |>
  fmt_number(starts_with(c("min", "max")), decimals = 2) |>
  fmt_percent(starts_with("con"), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_percent(starts_with("det"), decimals = 0) |>
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(min_aP, max_aP),
    pattern = "{1}–{2}"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(min_wP, max_wP),
    pattern = "{1}–{2}"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    obs_aP = "n",
    obs_wP = "n",
    gmc_aP = "GMC",
    gmc_wP = "GMC",
    min_aP = "Min–Max",
    min_wP = "Min–Max",
    det_aP = md("&ge;0.01"),
    det_wP = md("&ge;0.01"),
    con_aP = md("&ge;0.1"),
    con_wP = md("&ge;0.1")
  ) |>
  tab_stub_indent(
    rows = everything(),
    indent = 1
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "aP",
    columns = ends_with("_aP")
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "wP",
    columns = ends_with("_wP")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Values of 0.00 kU/L and 0.000 kU/L set to 0.005 and 0.0005 respectively for calculation of sample GMC.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = starts_with("gmc"))
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9)) |>
  as_latex() |>
  # Fix slash bug
  gsub(pattern = "\\\\textendash", replacement = "\\\\textendash ") |>
  cat()
```

```{r}
#| include: false
#| eval: false
dat_po |>
  right_join(dat_ige, join_by(record_id)) |>
  filter(grepl("egg|total", tolower(allergen))) |>
  mutate(
    egg = factor(
      grepl("egg", po_ofc_foods) |
        grepl("egg", po_ana_foods) |
        grepl("egg", po_ige_foods)
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(ige_imp = if_else(ige == 0, 0.0005, ige)) |>
  ggplot(aes(egg, ige_imp)) +
  facet_grid(allergen ~ visit_age) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(colour = egg)) +
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = scales::trans_breaks("log10", function(x) 10^x),
    labels = scales::trans_format("log10", scales::math_format(10^.x))
  ) +
  labs(colour = "Egg allergy")
```

### Geometric mean concentration

```{r}
#| label: model-ige-total
#| cache: true
fit_ige_model <- function(ige_ref) {
  age_labs <- c("6-month", "7-month", "19-month")

  mdat <- dat_ige |>
    filter(allergen == ige_ref) |>
    filter(!all(is.na(ige)), .by = subjid) |>
    mutate(log_ige = log10(ige))

  sdat1 <- make_stan_data(mdat, var = log_ige)
  sdat2 <- make_stan_data(
    mdat,
    var = log_ige,
    ~ trt + gender + bfed + fborn + parinc_imp + ces + fha
  )
  snk <- capture.output(
    sfit1 <- multinorm$sample(
      data = sdat1,
      seed = 71356,
      refresh = 0,
      chains = 8,
      iter_sampling = 1250
    )
  )
  snk <- capture.output(
    sfit2 <- multinorm$sample(
      data = sdat2,
      seed = 71356,
      refresh = 0,
      chains = 8,
      iter_warmup = 500,
      iter_sampling = 1250
    )
  )
  sdrw1 <- as_draws_rvars(sfit1)
  sdrw2 <- as_draws_rvars(sfit2)

  rownames(sdrw1$b) <- age_labs
  rownames(sdrw2$b) <- age_labs

  gmr1 <- 10^sdrw1$b[, 2]
  gmr2 <- 10^sdrw2$b[, 2]
  gmfir1 <- 10^(sdrw1$b[-1, 2] - sdrw1$b[-3, 2])
  gmfir2 <- 10^(sdrw2$b[-1, 2] - sdrw2$b[-3, 2])
  rownames(gmfir1) <- rownames(gmfir2) <- c("7/6-month (GMFR)", "19/7-month (GMFR)")

  # Fill missing observations with conditional predictions
  # yfill <- t(as_rvar(sdat1$Y))
  # yfill[which(t(sdat1$R == 1))] <- sdrw1$y_missing
  # yfill[which(t(sdat1$R == 2))] <- sdrw1$y_censored
  # yfill <- t(yfill)
  return(as_tibble(rbind(gmr2, gmfir2), rownames = "visit_age"))
}

res_total_ige <- fit_ige_model("Total IgE")
res_tetanus_ige <- fit_ige_model("Tetanus-toxoid")
res_eggwhite_ige <- fit_ige_model("Egg white")
res_wholeegg_ige <- fit_ige_model("Whole egg")

gmr <- bind_rows(
  mutate(res_total_ige, group = "Total IgE"),
  mutate(res_tetanus_ige, group = "Tetanus toxoid"),
  mutate(res_eggwhite_ige, group = "Egg white"),
  mutate(res_wholeegg_ige, group = "Whole egg")
)
gmr_dat <- gmr_table_dat(gmr)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-gmr-gmfir-ige-total
#| tbl-cap: Geometric mean ratio (GMR) and geometric mean fold rise ratio (GMFRR) for total IgE.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
#| results: "asis"
gmr_table(gmr_dat) |>
  as_latex()
```

### Sensitisation

```{r}
#| label: model-ige-sens
#| cache: true
fit_ige_sens_model <- function(ige_ref, ref_val) {
  mdat <- dat_ige |>
    filter(allergen == ige_ref) |>
    filter(!is.na(ige)) |>
    mutate(sens = as.numeric(ige >= ref_val))

  glmm_prior <- c(
    prior(student_t(4, 0, 1.75), class = "b"),
    prior(student_t(4, 0, 1.75), class = "Intercept"),
    prior(exponential(1), class = "sd")
  )

  mfit1 <- brm(
    sens ~ visit_age * trt + (1 | subjid),
    data = mdat,
    family = bernoulli(),
    backend = "cmdstanr",
    prior = glmm_prior,
    seed = 71235,
    refresh = 0,
    chains = 8,
    iter = 1750,
    warmup = 500
  )

  mfit2 <- update(
    mfit1,
    formula = ~ . +
      visit_age *
        (gender +
          bfed +
          fborn +
          ces +
          fha +
          parinc_imp),
    newdata = mdat
  )

  # Marginal risk difference estimate
  dat_ige |>
    mutate(trt = "aP") |>
    add_epred_rvars(mfit2, value = "aP", allow_new_levels = TRUE) |>
    mutate(trt = "wP") |>
    add_epred_rvars(mfit2, value = "wP", allow_new_levels = TRUE) |>
    mutate(dif = wP - aP) |>
    summarise(across(c(aP, wP, dif), rvar_mean), .by = visit_age)

  # mdrws1 <- rvar(as_draws_matrix(mfit1))
  # beta1 <- mdrws1[grepl("(^b_Inter|^b_age|^b_tr)", names(mdrws1))]
  # omega1 <- mdrws1["sd_subjectid__Intercept"]
  # beta1_marg <- do.call(c, as_draws_rvars(t(marginalcoef(mfit1, posterior = TRUE)$Posterior)))
  # names(beta1_marg) <- names(beta1)
  # cor1 <- exp(c(beta1[3], beta1[3] + beta1[4]))
  # mor1 <- exp(c(beta1_marg[3], beta1_marg[3] + beta1_marg[4]))

  mdrws2 <- rvar(as_draws_matrix(mfit2))
  beta2 <- mdrws2[grepl("(^b_Inter|^b_visit_age|^b_tr)", names(mdrws2))]
  omega2 <- mdrws2["sd_subjid__Intercept"]
  beta2_marg <- do.call(
    c,
    as_draws_rvars(t(marginalcoef(mfit2, posterior = TRUE)$Posterior))
  )
  names(beta2_marg) <- variables(mfit2)[1:30]
  beta2_marg <- beta2_marg[grepl(
    "(^b_Inter|^b_visit_age|^b_tr)",
    names(beta2_marg)
  )]
  cor2 <- exp(c(beta2[4], beta2[4] + beta2[5], beta2[4] + beta2[6]))
  mor2 <- exp(c(
    beta2_marg[4],
    beta2_marg[4] + beta2_marg[5],
    beta2_marg[4] + beta2_marg[6]
  ))
  p1 <- make_ate(dat_ige, mfit1) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = trt, values_from = posterior)
  p2 <- make_ate(dat_ige, mfit2) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = trt, values_from = posterior)
  tdat2 <- p2 |>
    select(-measure) |>
    bind_cols(cor = cor2, mor = mor2) |>
    mutate(group = ige_ref)
  return(tdat2)
}

snk <- capture.output({
  res_sens_tetanus <- fit_ige_sens_model("Tetanus-toxoid", 0.1)
  res_sens_eggwhite <- fit_ige_sens_model("Egg white", 0.1)
  res_sens_wholeegg <- fit_ige_sens_model("Whole egg", 0.1)
})

res_sens <- bind_rows(res_sens_tetanus, res_sens_eggwhite, res_sens_wholeegg) |>
  mutate(age = fct_rev(fct_inorder(visit_age)), group = fct_inorder(group)) |>
  relocate(group, .before = visit_age)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-sensitisation-summary
#| tbl-cap: Summary of sensitisation model by response type.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
out <- res_sens |>
  transmute(
    group,
    age,
    across(
      3:7,
      list(
        med = ~ median(.x),
        lo = ~ quantile(.x, 0.025)[1, ],
        hi = ~ quantile(.x, 0.975)[1, ]
      )
    ),
    across(5, list(pr = ~ Pr(.x < 0)))
  ) |>
  relocate(`wP - aP_pr`, .after = `wP - aP_hi`) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "age", groupname_col = "group") |>
  fmt_number(-(1:2), decimals = 2) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("wP_"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("aP_"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    c("wP - aP_med", "wP - aP_lo", "wP - aP_hi"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("cor"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("mor"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    "aP_med" = "aP",
    "wP_med" = "wP",
    "wP - aP_med" = "wP \u2212 aP",
    "wP - aP_pr" = "Pr(wP \u2212 aP < 0)",
    "cor_med" = "Conditional",
    "mor_med" = "Marginal"
  ) |>
  tab_stub_indent(
    rows = everything(),
    indent = 1
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    columns = c("aP_med", "wP_med", "wP - aP_med"),
    label = md("Standardised Pr(IgE $\\geq$ 0.1), Median (95% CrI)"),
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    columns = c("cor_med", "mor_med"),
    label = "Odds ratios"
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
out
```

\clearpage

### Quantitation

```{r}
#| label: model-ige-quant
#| cache: true
snk <- capture.output({
  res_sens_tetanus <- fit_ige_sens_model("Tetanus-toxoid", 0.01)
  res_sens_eggwhite <- fit_ige_sens_model("Egg white", 0.01)
  res_sens_wholeegg <- fit_ige_sens_model("Whole egg", 0.01)
})

res_sens <- bind_rows(res_sens_tetanus, res_sens_eggwhite, res_sens_wholeegg) |>
  mutate(age = fct_rev(fct_inorder(visit_age)), group = fct_inorder(group)) |>
  relocate(group, .before = visit_age)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-sensitisation-tetanus-summary
#| tbl-cap: Summary of sensitisation model for tetanus toxoid IgE.
#| tbl-pos: "H"
out <- res_sens |>
  transmute(
    group,
    age,
    across(
      3:7,
      list(
        med = ~ median(.x),
        lo = ~ quantile(.x, 0.025)[1, ],
        hi = ~ quantile(.x, 0.975)[1, ]
      )
    ),
    across(5, list(pr = ~ Pr(.x < 0)))
  ) |>
  relocate(`wP - aP_pr`, .after = `wP - aP_hi`) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "age", groupname_col = "group") |>
  fmt_number(-(1:2), decimals = 2) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("wP_"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("aP_"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    c("wP - aP_med", "wP - aP_lo", "wP - aP_hi"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("cor"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_merge(
    starts_with("mor"),
    pattern = "<<{1} ({2}, {3})>>"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    "aP_med" = "aP",
    "wP_med" = "wP",
    "wP - aP_med" = "wP \u2212 aP",
    "wP - aP_pr" = "Pr(wP \u2212 aP < 0)",
    "cor_med" = "Conditional",
    "mor_med" = "Marginal"
  ) |>
  tab_stub_indent(
    rows = everything(),
    indent = 1
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    columns = c("aP_med", "wP_med", "wP - aP_med"),
    label = md("Standardised Pr(IgE $\\geq$ 0.1), Median (95% CrI)"),
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    columns = c("cor_med", "mor_med"),
    label = "Odds ratios"
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
out
```
